SEARCH
Package bupt.ta.service

Class EmailNotificationService

java.lang.Object
bupt.ta.service.EmailNotificationService
public class EmailNotificationService extends Object
Sends emails using SMTP settings from admin settings, system properties or environment variables. Disabled by default until host/from are configured.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    EmailNotificationService.EmailSettings
    Resolved SMTP and portal settings used to send mail.
    static class 
    EmailNotificationService.SendResult
    Outcome of a single send attempt.

      public EmailNotificationService()

  • Method Details

    • loadSettings

      public EmailNotificationService.EmailSettings loadSettings()
      Loads SMTP settings from environment, local properties, and optional admin overrides.
      Returns:
      resolved settings (never null)

    • loadSettings

      public EmailNotificationService.EmailSettings loadSettings(AdminSettings adminSettings)
      Parameters:
      adminSettings - optional admin UI settings (may be null)
      Returns:
      resolved settings (never null)

    • isConfigured

      public boolean isConfigured()
      Returns:
      true when SMTP host and from-address are configured

    • isConfigured

      public boolean isConfigured(AdminSettings adminSettings)
      Parameters:
      adminSettings - optional admin UI settings
      Returns:
      true when SMTP host and from-address are configured

    • sendPlainText

      public EmailNotificationService.SendResult sendPlainText(String to, String subject, String body)
      Parameters:
      to - recipient address
      subject - message subject
      body - plain-text body
      Returns:
      send outcome

    • sendPlainText

      public EmailNotificationService.SendResult sendPlainText(String to, String subject, String body, AdminSettings adminSettings)
      Parameters:
      to - recipient address
      subject - message subject
      body - plain-text body
      adminSettings - optional admin SMTP overrides
      Returns:
      send outcome

    • sendHtml

      public EmailNotificationService.SendResult sendHtml(String to, String subject, String plainBody, String htmlBody, AdminSettings adminSettings)
      Sends a multipart alternative message (plain + HTML).
      Parameters:
      to - recipient address
      subject - message subject
      plainBody - plain-text fallback
      htmlBody - HTML body
      adminSettings - optional admin SMTP overrides
      Returns:
      send outcome

    • maybeAppendPortalLink

      public String maybeAppendPortalLink(String body, String relativePath)
      Appends a portal URL line when ta.mail.appBaseUrl is configured.
      Parameters:
      body - existing message body
      relativePath - path under the app base URL (e.g. /ta/applications)
      Returns:
      body with link appended, or unchanged when not configured

    • maybeAppendPortalLink

      public String maybeAppendPortalLink(String body, String relativePath, AdminSettings adminSettings)
      Parameters:
      adminSettings - optional admin SMTP overrides
      Returns:
      body with link appended, or unchanged when not configured

    • resolvePortalUrl

      public String resolvePortalUrl(String relativePath, AdminSettings adminSettings)
      Builds an absolute portal URL for a relative path.
      Parameters:
      relativePath - path under the app base URL
      adminSettings - optional admin SMTP overrides
      Returns:
      absolute URL, or null when base URL is not configured

    • renderHtmlTemplate

      public String renderHtmlTemplate(String title, String bodyText, String actionText, String actionUrl)
      Returns:
      branded HTML email document

    • renderHtmlTemplate

      public String renderHtmlTemplate(String title, String displayName, String bodyText, String actionText, String actionUrl)
      Parameters:
      title - email heading
      displayName - optional recipient name shown in the body
      bodyText - plain message (newlines converted to HTML)
      actionText - optional button label
      actionUrl - optional button href
      Returns:
      branded HTML email document
